focus_points.label: Decision rights and expectations in cross-functional work.
focus_points.reason: Whether decision rights and partner expectations are still unclear, especially when priorities conflict, so she isn’t spending time decoding unspoken norms.

focus_points.label: How she runs alignment when priorities conflict.
focus_points.reason: How they communicate tradeoffs and drive alignment without over-indexing on consensus is a common onboarding gap for Mid PMs; it determines how quickly partners can move.

focus_points.label: Confidence and presence in cross-functional meetings.
focus_points.reason: Whether her uncertainty in cross-functional meetings is tied to specific situations (e.g., conflict, ambiguity, lack of a clear decision owner) versus general first-month nerves—worth clarifying what triggers it.

focus_points.label: Practical support and boundaries you’ll give her.
focus_points.reason: What she needs from you to reduce ambiguity—clear boundaries on what she decides vs escalates, plus concrete ways to run alignment—so her energy goes into planning and execution, not interpretation.
